xs.$description: Tailwind-compat — minimal lift. v1.1 named shadows live in semantic.shadow.*

focusRing.$description: Accessible focus ring — 3px @ jade.deep @ 22% alpha (matches --accent-glow light).

cta-rest.$description: v2 — Signal-orange CTA default. Hard ink offset, no blur. Signature gesture of candy register.

cta-hover.$description: v2 — CTA hover (lift). translate(-2px,-2px) accompanies the shadow growth.

cta-active.$description: v2 — CTA pressed (depress). translate(3px,3px) accompanies the shadow shrink — net effect: button visibly stamps.

card-candy.$description: v2 — Marketing cards / panels with ink border on candy fields.

card-paper.$description: v2 — Default app card on paper-cream substrate. Warm-tinted soft shadow.

lift-paper.$description: v2 — Hovered card / hero panel on paper-cream.

soft-paper.$description: v2 — Subtle hover, dropdowns on paper register.

input-inset-paper.$description: v2 — Input wells on paper register. Warm inset to read as depressed.
